name: Peanut Butter Cake
recipeInstructions: Heat oven to 350 degrees. Grease and flour round pan, 9x1-1/2 inches or square pan, 8x8x2". Beat all ingredients except peanut butter chips and chocolate chips on low speed for 30 seconds, scraping bowl constantly. Beat on high speed for 3 minutes, scraping bowl occasionally. Pour into pan. Sprinkle with chips. Bake 35-40 minutes or until toothpick inserted in center comes out clean; cool on wire rack.
